message:
test(fcp-store): add extreme overcoverage saturation test for coverage_bps

Add from_distribution_extreme_overcoverage_saturates_coverage_bps test
verifying that coverage_bps saturates to u32::MAX when total_symbols
greatly exceeds source_symbols, exercising the try_from saturation
path added in the previous commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
